purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `spec-evaluator` (judge a built task vs its spec)? Hardest negatives are `task-executor` (implement, same TASK-NNN surface) and `qa-edge-hunter` (the other 'QA').

cases.query: evaluate task TASK-007 against the spec
verify TASK-009 matches its acceptance criteria
grade this build and give me a verdict
does this implementation actually match the spec?
check the test coverage and acceptance criteria for this task
the evaluator passed — now hunt the edge cases it missed
run the full harness from pitch to ship
translate this Vietnamese requirement to English first
what time is it in Tokyo right now
